title: Detailed Vanilla Paintings 128x
description: Preserves vanilla paintings but with extra detail for use with other high-resolution resource packs
body:
Use this when the resource pack of your choice doesn't feature/has ugly paintings or you simply long for the vanilla ones - **_but want them to mesh together with the new textures!_**

The **128x version** works well with resource packs in 256x - 128x resolution range.
Use the [64x version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-vanilla-paintings-x64) for lower-res resource packs

Place it over any resorce pack you're already using to see the changes.
Compatible with any Minecraft version.
The 4 unused paintings are also covered.

![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7669b65ab31c3f91def2417580dbb310cf46363c.png)
